commands: vp install # should install packages first
vp outdated testnpm2 # should outdated package
vp outdated test-vite* # should outdated with one glob pattern
vp outdated test-vite* '*npm*' # aube accepts a single pattern; extra patterns warn
vp outdated --format json # should support json output
vp outdated --format list # aube does not support list format (warns)
vp outdated --format table # should support table output
vp outdated testnpm2 --long --format list # should support --long (list warns)
vp outdated -r # should support recursive output
vp outdated -P # should support prod output
vp outdated -D # should support dev output
vp outdated --no-optional # aube does not support --no-optional (warns)
vp outdated --compatible # aube does not support --compatible (warns)
json-edit package.json '_.optionalDependencies["test-vite-plus-other-optional"] = "^1.0.0"' && vp outdated --compatible # compatible w/ optional deps still warns
vp outdated --sort-by name # aube does not support --sort-by (warns)
